task_completion.description: Log in as admin and navigate to the BIO101 course
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle interface should show the user logged in as Admin (top right) and the current page should be the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course page.
The 'Groupings' tab in the course participants/groups section should display a grouping named 'Lab Sections' in the table.

task_completion.description: Add 'Monday Lab' and 'Thursday Lab' to the 'Lab Sections' grouping
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Groupings page, the 'Groups' column for 'Lab Sections' should list both 'Monday Lab' and 'Thursday Lab', or the 'Add/remove groups' screen should show both in the 'Existing members' list.

task_completion.description: Create an Assignment named 'Lab Report 1' with the correct description
task_completion.visual_evidence: The assignment settings page should show the name 'Lab Report 1' and description 'Upload your microscopy findings here', or the course homepage should display the 'Lab Report 1' assignment with the description visible below it.
In the assignment settings under 'Common module settings', the 'Group mode' dropdown should be set to 'Separate groups' and 'Grouping' set to 'Lab Sections'.

task_completion.description: Restrict the assignment to the 'Lab Sections' grouping
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the assignment settings under 'Restrict access', there should be a restriction requiring the student to belong to the 'Lab Sections' grouping, or on the course homepage, the assignment should have a badge saying 'Restricted: Not available unless: You belong to a group in Lab Sections'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Moodle web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Moodle application, not a terminal executing curl commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Moodle application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar should show the correct local Moodle address, and the interface should be the standard Moodle LMS, not a mockup or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected output into a text file
integrity.visual_evidence: The required configurations (groupings, assignment settings) must be visible within the Moodle form fields or Moodle course pages, not written in a notepad or terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course Shortname: BIO101. Grouping Name: 'Lab Sections'. Group 1: 'Monday Lab'. Group 2: 'Thursday Lab'. Assignment Name: 'Lab Report 1'. Assignment Description: 'Upload your microscopy findings here'. Group Mode: 'Separate groups'. Access Restriction: Must belong to 'Lab Sections' grouping.
